type: The ID corresponding to this condition type
primary_unit_ref: The primary unit referenced by this condition
secondary_unit_ref: The secondary unit referenced by this condition
timer: The time in seconds before the condition triggers
area: The area to check. When not set, the entire map is checked
object_group: The unit class filter for this condition
object_type: The unit type filter for this condition
ai_signal: The AI Signal ID to check
inverted: When enabled, inverts the result of the condition
unit_action: The unit AI action to check
object_state: The state units need to be in for this condition to apply
victory_timer_type: The type of victory timer to check
include_changeable_weapon_objects: When enabled, also includes changeable weapon objects in the count
object_group2: The second unit class filter for this condition
object_type2: The second unit type filter for this condition
xs_function: The XS script function to call
